tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting possible prediabetes or impaired glucose tolerance, while fasting glucose is within normal limits. Renal function (urea, creatinine) and electrolytes are within normal ranges. Slightly low total CO₂ may indicate mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis. Recommend follow-up for glycemic control and clinical correlation for acid-base status.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
